name: Fort Rolins Collection Agency
message: <p>They act like they don&rsquo;t seeЁЯЩИ our ransom noteЁЯЧТ , or they just don&rsquo;t negotiateЁЯдЭwith cyberterroristsЁЯТг. They restore their backups and think ignoring usЁЯЩЙ makes us go away. So now we also restore their backups, for all of you.</p> <p>Harita Group is dedicated to mining, logging rainforestsЁЯРТЁЯШн to plant palm oil monocultures, coal, and anything else that&rsquo;ll make them a profit through destroying their countries&rsquo; environment. Their SwissЁЯЗиЁЯЗнЁЯЗн  partner Glencore is well documented for it&rsquo;s human rights and environmental abuses in Latin America, including hiring paramilitary killers to drive indigenous off their lands so they can steal it. We think it&rsquo;s likely they operate the same in Indonesia and journalists will like to look through their emails
